name: marketingskills_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the marketingskills capability.

prompts.name: copywriting_prompt
prompts.template: Create an engaging marketing copy focused on {product} targeting {audience}, considering the tone: {tone_preference}.
prompts.use_case: Enhancing AI agent-generated marketing content for better SEO and engagement.

prompts.name: seo_analysis_prompt
prompts.template: Analyze the following keywords {keywords} and provide SEO improvement recommendations.
prompts.use_case: Optimizing digital marketing campaigns for improved conversion rates.

prompts.name: cro_optimization_prompt
prompts.template: Suggest conversion rate optimization strategies based on these performance metrics: {metrics}.
prompts.use_case: Generating targeted copywriting for product launches and promotions.

prompts.name: growth_strategy_prompt
prompts.template: Develop growth engineering tactics to increase user acquisition and retention for {business_model}.
prompts.use_case: Analyzing campaign performance to guide growth engineering strategies.

prompts.name: analytics_report_prompt
prompts.template: Generate an analytics report summarizing campaign performance with insights for improvement.
prompts.use_case: Supporting AI-driven marketing automation with expert marketing tactics.
